message:
Wrap nav links in Magnetic component for subtle hover magnetism

Each desktop navigation link is now wrapped in a <Magnetic strength={0.1}>
component from motion-wrapper.tsx, giving nav items a subtle physical pull
toward the cursor on hover. The Magnetic wrapper was already available and
imported but not yet applied to the nav items. The change is purely additive—
no layout, accessibility, or keyboard-navigation behavior is altered since
Magnetic only applies a transform on pointer events.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
